author: doll-agent
content:
Implement rank-preserving Smaller/Larger associated types in the Dimension trait. Per-impl mappings:
- Ix1::Smaller = Ix0, Ix1::Larger = Ix2
- Ix2..Ix5 follow the natural pattern
- Ix6::Larger = IxDyn (no Ix7 type; saturate to dyn rank)
- Ix0::Smaller = Ix0 (no negative ranks; saturate)
- IxDyn::Smaller = IxDyn::Larger = IxDyn (closed under both ops)

Update index_axis, slice_axis, insert_axis, remove_axis to return ArrayView<T, D::Smaller> or D::Larger instead of IxDyn. Bound the methods on D::NdarrayDim's RemoveAxis/Larger relation aligning with ferray's Smaller/Larger.

5 tests pinning the static return types (compile-time check via explicit type annotations): index_axis 2D->1D, 3D->2D, insert_axis 2D->3D, remove_axis 3D->2D, and Ix3->Ix2->Ix1->Ix0 chain.
